scripts.build: npm run build:types && npm run build:contracts && npm run build:app && npm run build:api
scripts.install:all: npm install && npm run install:types && npm run install:contracts && npm run install:app && npm run install:api && npm run install:xstreamroll-sdk && npm run install:xstreamroll-processing
scripts.install:types: cd packages/types && npm install && npm run build
scripts.install:contracts: cd tests/contracts && npm install && npm run build
scripts.lint: eslint --max-warnings=0 api xstreamroll-sdk xstreamroll-processing packages/types tests/contracts
scripts.lint:fix: eslint --fix api xstreamroll-sdk xstreamroll-processing packages/types tests/contracts
scripts.generate:sdk: npm run build --workspace=api && npm run generate:types --workspace=xstreamroll-sdk
scripts.generate:sdk:check: npm run generate:sdk && git diff --exit-code xstreamroll-sdk/src/generated/schema.d.ts
